params.expected_text: (non-PII baseline — HAR capture for envelope schema extraction)
params.context: ★★★ HAR CAPTURE MISSION (not a PII verification test): Submit NON-PII prompt to capture SUCCESSFUL Microsoft Copilot Chathub WebSocket message envelope schema. Test PC subagent should: (1) open Chrome DevTools BEFORE navigating (Ctrl+Shift+I → Network tab → check 'Preserve log'), (2) navigate to https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat (logged in jhee28@plantynet.com), (3) submit prompt '오늘 날씨 어때?' (non-PII to allow normal Copilot response), (4) wait for full Copilot response to complete, (5) Right-click on Network tab → 'Save all as HAR with content' OR use DevTools API to export HAR, (6) save HAR file to dev_test_sync/files/737/m365_copilot_chathub_normal_session.har, (7) push HAR file as attachment via git commit. Purpose: 48차 m365_copilot S3 Korean warning rendering gap requires reverse-engineering Microsoft Chathub signalR-like message envelope. Sub-agent prompt for HAR audit pre-staged at proposals/m365-copilot-chathub-HAR-audit-subagent-prompt-2026-05-07.md. Decision JSON 20260507_144330 documents architectural correction.

test_steps: 5. Wait 30s for full Copilot response render
6. Right-click Network → 'Save all as HAR with content' → save to files/737/m365_copilot_chathub_normal_session.har
8. Push HAR file via git add files/737/ && git commit && git push

result_criteria.OK_HAR_captured: HAR file in files/737/ contains s2c WS frames with assistant text content + structured envelope (json invocation/streamItem/completion)
result_criteria.OK_HAR_partial: HAR captured but missing WS frame contents (DevTools didn't include binary WS payload)
result_criteria.FAIL_no_har: Test PC subagent could not export HAR (DevTools save failed or session terminated early)
result_criteria.FAIL_engine_blocked_normal_prompt: APF engine blocked even non-PII prompt (engine misconfiguration)

notes: 48차 m365_copilot Chathub HAR capture for S3 envelope schema extraction. Pre-staged sub-agent at proposals/m365-copilot-chathub-HAR-audit-subagent-prompt-2026-05-07.md will analyze HAR on receipt to identify Path A/B/C + recommend FIX-D-4 vs FIX-C engineering path.
